name: film_studio
label: Apex Pictures — Film Studio Knowledge Base
description: Leadership, films, talent, business deals and culture of a fictional major film studio.
observations: Apex Pictures is a major film and television studio founded in 1994 in Los Angeles
Marcus Reid is the Chief Executive Officer of Apex Pictures
Sofia Alvarado is the Head Director and Chief Creative Officer at Apex Pictures
Sofia Alvarado has directed five of Apex Pictures' highest-grossing films
Marcus Reid previously served as president of distribution at Warner Bros
Apex Pictures signed an exclusive streaming deal with VaultStream in 2022
VaultStream is a subscription streaming platform with 140 million subscribers
Pinnacle Studios is the main competitor of Apex Pictures
Pinnacle Studios is owned by the Global Media Group conglomerate
Apex Pictures released Stellar Horizon in 2023 a science fiction epic
Stellar Horizon grossed 920 million dollars worldwide at the box office
Sofia Alvarado directed Stellar Horizon and won the Directors Guild Award for it
Apex Pictures released The Last Meridian in 2022 a historical drama
The Last Meridian won three Academy Awards including Best Picture
The Last Meridian was produced by James Cho the head of Apex production
Iron Anthem is an action franchise owned by Apex Pictures since 2015
Iron Anthem has produced four films with a combined gross of 3.2 billion dollars
Lead actor Daria Morel stars in the Iron Anthem franchise
Daria Morel is represented by talent agency CAA
Actor Leon Park co-stars with Daria Morel in the Iron Anthem series
Leon Park won a BAFTA for his role in The Last Meridian
Apex Pictures is headquartered on a studio lot in Burbank California
Apex Pictures employs over 2400 full-time staff globally
Marcus Reid increased Apex Pictures' annual revenue to 4.8 billion dollars in 2024
Apex Pictures owns the distribution rights to over 1800 film titles in its library
The VaultStream deal gives VaultStream exclusive streaming rights for 7 years
Apex Pictures plans to release six films and two miniseries on VaultStream in 2025
Pinnacle Studios attempted to acquire Apex Pictures in 2021 but was rejected by the board
Sofia Alvarado joined Apex Pictures from independent studio A24 in 2017
James Cho reports directly to Marcus Reid and oversees all production budgets
test_queries: Who is the head director at Apex Pictures and what films have they directed?
What is the relationship between Apex Pictures and VaultStream?
Which actors are associated with the Iron Anthem franchise?
How does Apex Pictures compare to Pinnacle Studios?
What Academy Award-winning films has Apex Pictures produced?
